coach_notes: Focus on filling the backend and AWS gaps first, as they are foundational for most tech roles and directly enable scalable API development. Next, prioritize Git and CI/CD, since these are essential for collaborative code management and deployment in real-world environments. Finally, add TypeScript and debugging skills to improve code quality and maintainability, which are frequently required in job postings.
